pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 17 if source/target remain at 8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 which requires Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17; using an older version or running on older JDK causes runtime/compile incompatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito version to 5.23.1-SNAPSHOT compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions may not support Java 17 bytecode or features; upgrade ensures compatibility.
